root_text.sn45.26:1.3: Sappurisañca vo, bhikkhave, desessāmi sappurisena sappurisatarañca.
root_text.sn45.26:1.6: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco micchādiṭṭhiko hoti …pe… micchāsamādhi—
root_text.sn45.26:2.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco micchādiṭṭhiko hoti …pe… micchāsamādhi, micchāñāṇī, micchāvimutti—
root_text.sn45.26:3.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco sammādiṭṭhiko hoti …pe… sammāsamādhi—
root_text.sn45.26:4.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco sammādiṭṭhiko hoti …pe… sammāsamādhi, sammāñāṇī, sammāvimutti—

translation_text.sn45.26:1.2: “Mendicants, I will teach you an untrue person and an even more untrue person,
translation_text.sn45.26:1.3: a true person and an even truer person.
translation_text.sn45.26:1.5: And what is an untrue person?
translation_text.sn45.26:1.6: It’s someone who has wrong view, wrong thought, wrong speech, wrong action, wrong livelihood, wrong effort, wrong mindfulness, and wrong immersion.
translation_text.sn45.26:1.7: This is called an untrue person.
translation_text.sn45.26:2.1: And what is an even more untrue person?
translation_text.sn45.26:2.2: It’s someone who has wrong view, wrong thought, wrong speech, wrong action, wrong livelihood, wrong effort, wrong mindfulness, wrong immersion, wrong knowledge, and wrong freedom.
translation_text.sn45.26:2.3: This is called an even more untrue person.
translation_text.sn45.26:3.1: And what is a true person?
translation_text.sn45.26:3.2: It’s someone who has right view, right thought, right speech, right action, right livelihood, right effort, right mindfulness, and right immersion.
translation_text.sn45.26:3.3: This is called a true person.
translation_text.sn45.26:4.1: And what is an even truer person?
translation_text.sn45.26:4.2: It’s someone who has right view, right thought, right speech, right action, right livelihood, right effort, right mindfulness, right immersion, right knowledge, and right freedom.
translation_text.sn45.26:4.3: This is called an even truer person.”
